feedback.text: Digital fairness should also address video games sphere. The Europe gaming market was worth USD 100.47 billion in 2024. Video games are used by all ages, and mostly by our youth. Many popular video games, even rated E include gambling, lotteries, suggestive marketing that is targeted to kids and teens. Also video game publisher, developer companies have free reign online and slips through with their unfair and predatory consumer practices.
